executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for a chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts to start or run in dev mode, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON file containing pre-extracted keywords and one-sentence summaries for other project files, structured as a nested object with file paths as keys.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to DeepSeek chat completions API, supporting streaming and non-streaming responses.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that forwards POST requests to a configurable Railway API endpoint with authentication, extracting the route suffix from the request path.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to the Firecrawl search API, processes results into a standardized format.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Edge function that returns a GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables via GET request with CORS headers.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to OpenRouter's chat completions API, supporting streaming responses via SSE and handling errors.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Injects a script into index.html during deploy-preview context to hide the login gate and display the root element.

preferences.json.summary: Editable preferences JSON for a self-improving bot, defining custom prompts, planning rules, code style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: React chat component that manages messages, tasks, running state, and pending commands using workspace and provider stores.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Responsive header component for SimpleChat with repo and branch inputs, styled for mobile and desktop.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: InputBar component renders a styled input field and send button with responsive layout adapting to mobile width using windowWidth.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: MessageList component displays chat messages with role-based styling (user/agent), supports auto-scroll and mobile-responsive font sizes.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: TaskList component shows a list of tasks with color-coded status indicators (DONE, FAILED, in-progress) and mobile-responsive height.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: Toaster component renders a fixed-position toast notification with border color indicating error (red) or success (green).

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: SelfImprover class orchestrates self-improvement runs using hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, dependency ordering, and LLM calls within 20-second timeout.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: Accumulates information gathered during an agentic run, storing file summaries and notes, then builds a compact context string for the LLM.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Executes a single task using a read-before-write loop where the LLM may request additional file reads before emitting the final code block.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: Plans a change by exploring the codebase, reading candidate files, and iteratively deciding actions until ready to produce a plan.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in small groups, extracting keywords and summaries, and committing the resulting JSON.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: Generates clarifying questions with a timeout and returns the original goal if the user does not respond within 30 seconds.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Coordinates multi-agent planning by grouping candidate files by directory, running parallel exploration agents per directory, and merging summaries into a plan that may include files or subGoals for hierarchical execution.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files for a goal by loading or falling back to a keywords index, scoring files based on keyword matches with the goal, and returning the top-scored candidates.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners to decompose complex goals into sub-goals using LLM-based decision and decomposition, then creates a hierarchical plan with tasks and dependencies.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides fuzzy matching using Levenshtein distance, prefix, and exact match scoring to find the best matching command.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest is present by loading from repository or building it from JavaScript source files using ManifestBuilder.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes the task queue in parallel up to maxConcurrency, using executeTaskAgentic for each task and avoiding conflicts by skipping tasks that touch locked files.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Saves and loads working memory to/from the repo using a runId to avoid overwrites, with functions to serialise and deserialise WorkingMemory instances.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Uses LLM to create a plan with tasks based on discovered files, returning JSON with milestone title, analysis, and up to four tasks with exact file paths.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a pull request on GitHub with a title derived from the goal, using GitHubService to call the API.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews tasks by checking file content against task description using a strict checklist, outputting PASS or ISSUES as the first word.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Provides task queue initialization and status management functions for tracking tasks with TODO, DONE, and FAILED states.

src/main.js.summary: Main application entry that initializes services and creates a SelfImprover instance with configuration from workspace and provider stores, and attempts to load GitHub token from Netlify environment.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Manages agent preferences by loading and saving a preferences.json file from a GitHub repository with default values for clarification, planning, execution, and review settings.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides methods to call lint and syntax endpoints via a Netlify proxy, with fail-open behavior on network errors so Railway outages don't block commits.

src/services/github.js.summary: Implements GitHub API methods for fetching repository file trees, loading file contents, and committing multiple files with base64 decoding.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Provides a unified method for calling language models through Netlify edge proxies with configurable timeout, thinking mode, and reasoning effort.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: Polls a Netlify deploy preview URL until it returns a healthy page or times out, used for verifying PR deployments.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Zustand store with persistence for managing the selected LLM provider, model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort settings.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Zustand store with persistence for managing workspace settings including current repo, branch, GitHub token, and whether to remember keys.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies for custom skill tags (update_editor and read_file) and extracts file changes and file read requests while removing the tags from the reply.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Exports ContextBuilder class with methods to identify required files from a manifest and build a context string from target and related files, respecting a token budget.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Provides ManifestBuilder class that builds a dependency manifest from file list by extracting exports and imports and resolving relative paths to build importedBy reverse dependencies.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Exports testCodeSandbox function that executes code in a sandboxed iframe with pre-loaded service modules, returns health check result or false on timeout/error.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Exports stripComments function that removes JavaScript/CSS comments and blank lines to reduce prompt size.
